Micah Nori put in work and is highly respected within the NBA. His reported contract with the Portland Trail Blazers - 1 yr guarateed - is puzzling but not puzzling.

After too many interviews that go nowhere, longtime assistants tend to take the first offer, even if it's not ideal.

2026: Connelly trades Randle for cap space/TBD. Everyone said that was bad...
